files.description: Defines the strictly-typed database structures, explicitly mapping relationships where Projects act as parental containers for notes, tasks, and resources.
Establishes the Dexie schema indexing strategy, ensuring performant local querying for high volumes of historical notes and tasks.
Enforces browser-native local encryption of the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) via the Web Crypto API using PBKDF2 for key derivation and AES-GCM for encryption.
The operational heart of Northgate. It coordinates standard state properties alongside direct Dexie reactivity.
Implements the background GitHub file sync framework mapping notes and project goals directly to your exact folder specification.
The operational terminal of Northgate. It implements the 'Emerald with subtle blue highlights' palette and visualizes workspace configurations.
files.content:
import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNorthgateStore } from '../../store/useNorthgateStore'; import { Flame, FolderPlus, Plus, CheckSquare, Layers, TrendingUp, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; const chartData = [ { day: 'Mon', entries: 3, completions: 4 }, { day: 'Tue', entries: 5, completions: 7 }, { day: 'Wed', entries: 2, completions: 2 }, { day: 'Thu', entries: 6, completions: 8 }, { day: 'Fri', entries: 8, completions: 10 }, { day: 'Sat', entries: 4, completions: 5 }, { day: 'Sun', entries: 7, completions: 9 }, ]; export const Dashboard: React.FC = () => { const { projects, todayTasks, recentNotes, streak, initialize, toggleTask, activeWorkspace } = useNorthgateStore(); useEffect(() => { initialize(); }, [initialize]); const activeProjects = projects.filter(p => p.status === 'active'); const totalTasksCount = todayTasks.length; const completedTasksCount = todayTasks.filter(t => t.completed).length; const taskCompletionRate = totalTasksCount > 0 ? Math.round((completedTasksCount / totalTasksCount) * 100) : 0; return (

{activeProjects.length === 0 ? (

No active projects found.

) : (
{activeProjects.map((project) => { const completedGoals = project.goals.filter(g => g.completed).length; const totalGoals = project.goals.length; const progressPct = totalGoals > 0 ? Math.round((completedGoals / totalGoals) * 100) : 0; return (

{project.name}

{project.description}

Goals {completedGoals}/{totalGoals} ({progressPct}%)
); })}
)}

) : (

  • toggleTask(task.id, e.target.checked)} className="mt-0.5 accent-emerald-500 rounded border-slate-800 cursor-pointer" /> {task.text}
    • ))}
)}

) : (
